message.content:
Critique and refine an implementation plan for two features in the Godot 4.6 game at C:\Users\duran\Documents\godot\glamdring. Read the relevant files first: fight.gd, fight.tscn, enemy.gd, enemy_basic.gd, combatant.gd, player.gd, hud.gd, balance.gd, balance.json, gameplay.md, plan.md, sprites/SPRITES.md. List sprites/ for available sheets.

CONTEXT — the game is 1v1 reaction combat, 16 ticks/sec, all logic in fight.gd _on_tick(), tunables in balance.json via the Balance autoload, sprites = one cell per stance (region_rect swap), no physics. Player is invincible. There is a fatigue system: enemy fatigue -> exhausted (the main "open" window); active parry & strong-in-idle drain fatigue; getting hit regens enemy HP+fatigue. A recent "Riposte & Rampage" update added: perfect-parry -> staggered state, riposte (active parry arms x1.6 next clean hit), combo+rank HUD, enemy feints, execute (<=25hp x1.5), hit-stop, readability tints. These are all implemented and working.

FEATURE 1 — ENDLESS MODE (new default loop):
- Kill an enemy (hp<=0) -> instead of the "VYHRA" win overlay, increment a wave counter and spawn the NEXT enemy immediately at the same position (456,384). Runs forever (player invincible, no lose condition). Space restarts the whole run anytime. Combo persists across waves (only resets on getting hit / 48t timeout). Show WAVE number + SCORE in HUD, plus a brief "WAVE N" banner on spawn.
- Wave composition (progressive): waves 1-2 = weak enemy (new type, below); 3-4 = enemy_basic; 5+ = mix + MILD difficulty scaling (shorten telegraphs/recovery toward a floor, slightly raise strong_probability), capped.
- The enemy is currently a fixed Node2D + enemy_basic.gd script in fight.tscn (no enemy .tscn). Dynamic respawn: preload enemy scripts in fight.gd, free the old enemy node, instantiate the chosen Script.new() as Enemy, set position, add_child, rebind fight.gd's `enemy` var. Sprites self-create in _ready(); HUD only reads enemy stats; no signals — confirmed safe.

FEATURE 2 — WEAK ENEMY TYPE (skeleton, fatigue-less, chip-through-block):
- New enemy_weak.gd extends Enemy. Uses sprites/skeleton-basic.png (192x32, 6 cells, same layout as enemy_basic). No skeleton weapon sheet exists -> reuse enemy_basic_weapon.png for its weapon overlay (note as art TODO).
- NO fatigue: no fatigue bar, never enters exhausted, no fatigue drain, NO HP regen when it hits the player.
- "Can defend" via CHIP: hitting it while idle deals REDUCED damage (chip_multiplier ~0.34: weak 15->~5, strong 25->~8) straight to HP. Hitting it in recovery/staggered deals FULL damage (with riposte/execute multipliers as normal). threat_* still immune.
- Chip hits do NOT build combo, do NOT consume riposte, do NOT get riposte/execute multipliers, and get only light fx (distinct "blocked/chip" feedback) — so clean punishes stay the skillful, rewarding path.
- "Weaker": lower max HP (per-type, ~70), longer/more readable telegraphs, generous recovery windows, mostly weak attacks, no feints.

PROPOSED ARCHITECTURE (critique this for correctness, minimality, and missed touch points):
1. Capability hooks on Enemy base (overridden by enemy_weak): has_fatigue()->bool (base true), idle_chip_multiplier()->float (base 0.0 = full block), max_hp()->int (base Balance.hp_max). fight.gd branches on these instead of checking concrete type. Combatant.damage_hp/heal_hp clamp to max_hp() (add max_hp() to Combatant base too, default Balance.hp_max); enemy.gd HP bar % uses max_hp().
2. fight.gd resolve changes: gate fatigue<=0->exhausted check, regen-on-hit (heal+add_fatigue), active-parry drain, and strong-in-idle drain all by enemy.has_fatigue(). Add a chip branch in the idle case of _resolve_player_swing when idle_chip_multiplier()>0 (deal reduced damage, light fx, no combo/riposte/execute).
3. Sprite-source refactor (per SPRITES.md guidance): move the enemy sheet source to overridable accessors _sprite_sheet()/_weapon_sheet() (keep SPRITE_CELL_SIZE/SCALE/SPRITE_INDEX shared since layout is identical). Base returns enemy_basic sheets; enemy_weak overrides to skeleton-basic.png + enemy_basic_weapon.png. _ready() and _update_sprite() use the accessors.
4. Balance namespacing: add an "enemy_weak" section + "endless" section to balance.json. Load "enemy_weak" as a Dictionary var in Balance (avoid colliding with enemy_basic's flat fields). enemy_weak.gd reads its tunables from Balance.enemy_weak dict with int()/float() + defaults. Leave enemy_basic's flat fields untouched.
5. Endless state in fight.gd: wave:int, score:int, banner timer. Replace win flow with _advance_wave()/_spawn_enemy(wave). Difficulty scale passed to spawned enemy (e.g. speed_scale property the threat/recovery accessors divide by, capped). HUD: wave+score top-left, keep combo top-center, remove/replace VYHRA overlay, add WAVE banner.

DELIVER:
- A step-by-step implementation plan grouped by file, naming exact functions/fields to add/change and the existing functions they hook into (with file:line where possible).
- Flag any correctness risks (tick ordering, dynamic respawn timing/queue_free, draw order, chip interacting with combo/riposte/execute, scaling math, HP bar with per-type max), and any place my capability-flag approach is cleaner-or-uglier than an alternative.
- Call out exactly which balance.json keys to add (with suggested starting values) and which md files/sections need syncing (gameplay.md, plan.md, SPRITES.md, CLAUDE.md).
- Keep it tight and executable. Do NOT write any code or edit files — design only.

- maestri: Send messages to connected AI agents on the Maestri canvas and get their responses. Also read and write connected sticky notes. Use when the user's intent is to collaborate with another agent on the canvas. Look for actions like 'ask [name] to...', 'tell [name] to...', 'check on [name]', or 'create/update a note'.
- maestri-manager: Create new connected agent terminals on the Maestri canvas and assign them roles. Use when the user asks to assemble a team, delegate parallel work, or spin up additional agents or terminals to help, or to invoke Maestro Mode.
- maestri-portal: Use a browser portal on the Maestri canvas to navigate the web, interact with pages, fill forms, and inspect content. Use when the user asks to browse a URL, test a web UI, or interact with a website.
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	extends Node2D
2	
3	# Fight scene controller. Owns the 16 Hz tick accumulator, calls combatant
4	# ticks in order, resolves swing events, updates the HUD, checks win condition.
5	
6	const TICKS_PER_SECOND := 16
7	const TICK_DURATION := 1.0 / TICKS_PER_SECOND
8	
9	# Gameplay resolve numbers (damage, fatigue, regen, hit flash) live in
10	# `balance.json` and are accessed via the `Balance` autoload. Only visual
11	# polish constants (shake/particles) remain as `const` below.
12	
13	# Polish fx — purely visual, no gameplay impact.
14	const SHAKE_HIT_WEAK := 4.0
15	const SHAKE_HIT_STRONG := 10.0
16	const SHAKE_FATIGUE := 3.0
17	const SHAKE_DECAY_PER_SEC := 30.0
18	const PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE := 10
19	const PARTICLES_FATIGUE := 6
20	const PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS := 0.45
21	const PARTICLE_SPEED_MIN := 80.0
22	const PARTICLE_SPEED_MAX := 220.0
23	const PARTICLE_SIZE := 4.0
24	const PARTICLE_DRAG := 0.92  # velocity multiplier per frame at 60 fps reference
25	const COLOR_HIT_DAMAGE := Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3, 1.0)
26	const COLOR_FATIGUE_FX := Color(0.95, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)
27	const COLOR_PLAYER_HIT := Color(0.9, 0.3, 0.3, 1.0)
28	const COLOR_STAGGER_FX := Color(0.5, 0.85, 1.0, 1.0)
29	const COLOR_RIPOSTE_FX := Color(1.0, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)
30	
31	@onready var player: Node2D = $Player
32	@onready var enemy: Node2D = $Enemy
33	@onready var hud: CanvasLayer = $HUD
34	@onready var background_canvas: CanvasLayer = $Background
35	
36	var tick_acc: float = 0.0
37	var game_over: bool = false
38	
39	# Hit-stop freeze timer (real seconds). While > 0 the tick loop is frozen but
40	# shake/particles/redraw keep updating — pure presentation, gameplay-neutral.
41	var hitstop_timer: float = 0.0
42	
43	# Polish fx state.
44	var shake_amount: float = 0.0
45	var rng_fx := RandomNumberGenerator.new()
46	# Each particle: {pos: Vector2, vel: Vector2, life: float, color: Color}
47	var particles: Array = []
48	
49	
50	func _process(delta: float) -> void:
51		if hitstop_timer > 0.0:
52			hitstop_timer = maxf(0.0, hitstop_timer - delta)
53		else:
54			tick_acc += delta
55			while tick_acc >= TICK_DURATION and hitstop_timer <= 0.0:
56				tick_acc -= TICK_DURATION
57				_on_tick()
58		_update_shake(delta)
59		_update_particles(delta)
60		queue_redraw()
61	
62	
63	func _update_shake(delta: float) -> void:
64		if shake_amount <= 0.0:
65			position = Vector2.ZERO
66			background_canvas.offset = Vector2.ZERO
67			return
68		var dir := Vector2(
69			rng_fx.randf_range(-1.0, 1.0),
70			rng_fx.randf_range(-1.0, 1.0)
71		)
72		if dir.length() > 0.001:
73			dir = dir.normalized()
74		position = dir * shake_amount
75		# Mirror shake into the background CanvasLayer (it's outside the Fight
76		# Node2D transform, so offset is the only way to shake it).
77		background_canvas.offset = position
78		shake_amount = maxf(0.0, shake_amount - SHAKE_DECAY_PER_SEC * delta)
79	
80	
81	func _update_particles(delta: float) -> void:
82		for i in range(particles.size() - 1, -1, -1):
83			var p: Dictionary = particles[i]
84			p.life -= delta
85			if p.life <= 0.0:
86				particles.remove_at(i)
87				continue
88			p.pos += p.vel * delta
89			p.vel *= PARTICLE_DRAG
90	
91	
92	func _trigger_shake(amount: float) -> void:
93		# Combine — don't downgrade an already-bigger shake in progress.
94		shake_amount = maxf(shake_amount, amount)
95	
96	
97	func _trigger_hitstop(amount: float) -> void:
98		# Combine — don't shorten an already-longer freeze in progress.
99		hitstop_timer = maxf(hitstop_timer, amount)
100	
101	
102	func _spawn_particles(at: Vector2, color: Color, count: int) -> void:
103		for _i in count:
104			var angle := rng_fx.randf_range(-PI, PI)
105			var speed := rng_fx.randf_range(PARTICLE_SPEED_MIN, PARTICLE_SPEED_MAX)
106			var vel := Vector2(cos(angle), sin(angle)) * speed
107			particles.append({
108				"pos": at,
109				"vel": vel,
110				"life": PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS,
111				"color": color,
112			})
113	
114	
115	func _between_combatants() -> Vector2:
116		return (player.position + enemy.position) * 0.5
117	
118	
119	func _draw() -> void:
120		for p: Dictionary in particles:
121			var alpha := clampf(p.life / PARTICLE_LIFE_SECONDS, 0.0, 1.0)
122			var col: Color = p.color
123			col.a = alpha
124			var s := PARTICLE_SIZE
125			draw_rect(Rect2(p.pos - Vector2(s, s) * 0.5, Vector2(s, s)), col)
126	
127	
128	func _on_tick() -> void:
129		if game_over:
130			# In win state — only listen for restart.
131			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_SPACE):
132				get_tree().reload_current_scene()
133			_update_hud()
134			return
135	
136		# Tick order: player first, enemy second. (Doesn't materially matter because
137		# resolution happens after both have ticked, but keeps deterministic.)
138		player.tick()
139		enemy.tick()
140	
141		# Player input handled at tick boundary (post-countdown so freshly-finished
142		# states allow new input on the same tick).
143		player.handle_input()
144	
145		# Resolve enemy swing first (enemy attack lands on player).
146		if enemy.swing_this_tick:
147			_resolve_enemy_swing()
148	
149		# Then player swing (player attack lands on enemy).
150		if player.swing_this_tick:
151			_resolve_player_swing()
152	
153		# Fatigue → exhausted transition (enemy only — player has no fatigue).
154		if enemy.fatigue <= 0 and enemy.state != &"exhausted":
155			enemy.enter_exhausted()
156	
157		# Win check.
158		if enemy.hp <= 0:
159			game_over = true
160	
161		_update_hud()
162	
163	
164	# --- Resolves ------------------------------------------------------------
165	
166	func _resolve_enemy_swing() -> void:
167		# Enemy swing event on the last tick of threat_*.
168		var kind: StringName = enemy.pending_attack_kind
169	
170		# 1. Player dodging (invincible window) → miss.
171		if player.state == &"dodging" and player.dodge_invincible:
172			return
173	
174		# 2. Weak attack + player blocking → block. Active parry drains enemy fatigue
175		# AND arms a riposte on the player. Perfect parry (block started within
176		# perfect_parry_ticks) additionally staggers the enemy. Passive block (held
177		# too long) just protects: no drain, no riposte.
178		if kind == &"weak" and player.state == &"blocking":
179			if player.is_active_block():
180				enemy.drain_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak)
181				player.set_riposte_ready()
182				if player.is_perfect_parry():
183					enemy.enter_stagger()
184					_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_STRONG)
185					_trigger_hitstop(Balance.hitstop_stagger)
186					_spawn_particles(_between_combatants(), COLOR_STAGGER_FX, PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE)
187				else:
188					_trigger_shake(SHAKE_FATIGUE)
189					_trigger_hitstop(Balance.hitstop_parry)
190					_spawn_particles(_between_combatants(), COLOR_FATIGUE_FX, PARTICLES_FATIGUE)
191			return
192	
193		# 3. Strong attack + player blocking → block ineffective (fall through).
194		# 4. Otherwise → player hit (player invincible, but enemy regens).
195		enemy.heal_hp(Balance.enemy_hp_regen_on_hit)
196		enemy.add_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit)
197		_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_WEAK if kind == &"weak" else SHAKE_HIT_STRONG)
198		player.trigger_flash(Balance.hit_flash_ticks)
199		_spawn_particles(player.position, COLOR_PLAYER_HIT, PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE)
200		# Player got hit: break combo and a small hit-stop punch.
201		player.reset_combo()
202		_trigger_hitstop(Balance.hitstop_weak)
203	
204	
205	func _resolve_player_swing() -> void:
206		var kind: StringName = player.pending_attack_kind
207		var es: StringName = enemy.state
208	
209		# Enemy in threat_* → no effect (telegraph cannot be interrupted).
210		if es == &"threat_weak" or es == &"threat_strong":
211			return
212	
213		# Enemy in idle → blocks player attacks, with strong draining fatigue.
214		if es == &"idle":
215			if kind == &"strong":
216				enemy.drain_fatigue(Balance.enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle)
217				_trigger_shake(SHAKE_FATIGUE)
218				_spawn_particles(enemy.position, COLOR_FATIGUE_FX, PARTICLES_FATIGUE)
219			# TODO: future visual block feedback could be a temporary sprite swap
220			# (e.g. a `block_react` stance cell) on enemy.gd. For now no extra fx.
221			return
222	
223		# Enemy in recovery_*, exhausted, or staggered → hit lands. Riposte and
224		# execute multipliers stack multiplicatively; round once at the end.
225		if es == &"recovery_weak" or es == &"recovery_strong" or es == &"exhausted" or es == &"staggered":
226			var base_dmg: int = Balance.hp_damage_weak if kind == &"weak" else Balance.hp_damage_strong
227			var dmg: float = float(base_dmg)
228			var is_riposte: bool = player.is_riposte_ready()
229			if is_riposte:
230				dmg *= Balance.riposte_damage_multiplier
231			var is_execute: bool = enemy.hp <= Balance.execute_threshold_hp
232			if is_execute:
233				dmg *= Balance.execute_damage_multiplier
234			enemy.damage_hp(int(round(dmg)))
235			if is_riposte:
236				player.consume_riposte()
237			player.add_combo()
238			# juice
239			var big: bool = is_riposte or is_execute or kind == &"strong"
240			_trigger_shake(SHAKE_HIT_STRONG if big else SHAKE_HIT_WEAK)
241			_trigger_hitstop(Balance.hitstop_strong if big else Balance.hitstop_weak)
242			enemy.trigger_flash(Balance.hit_flash_ticks)
243			var fx_col: Color = COLOR_RIPOSTE_FX if is_riposte else COLOR_HIT_DAMAGE
244			_spawn_particles(enemy.position, fx_col, PARTICLES_HIT_DAMAGE)
245			return
246	
247		# Fallback (shouldn't normally hit): treat as blocked.
248	
249	
250	func _update_hud() -> void:
251		# State-ticks field is repurposed per-state for visibility:
252		#   blocking → active parry window remaining (0..Balance.block_active_ticks)
253		#   other    → state_ticks_remaining
254		var p_ticks: int = player.state_ticks_remaining
255		if player.state == &"blocking":
256			p_ticks = player.active_block_ticks_remaining()
257		hud.update(
258			enemy.hp, enemy.fatigue, enemy.state, enemy.state_ticks_remaining,
259			player.state, p_ticks,
260			player.dodge_cooldown_ticks, game_over,
261			player.combo, player.combo_rank(), player.max_combo
262		)

1	class_name Enemy
2	extends Combatant
3	
4	# Abstract enemy. Concrete subclasses must override _pick_attack and
5	# _pick_idle_duration. Owns enemy FSM transitions (idle -> threat -> recovery
6	# -> idle, plus exhausted side branch). Swing event happens on the last tick
7	# of threat_* — fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` & `pending_attack_kind`.
8	
9	# --- Sprite rendering ----------------------------------------------------
10	# Enemy body = Sprite2D with region_rect cell-picker. Each FSM stance
11	# maps 1:1 to a cell in the strip (no sub-stances for basic enemy). A second
12	# Sprite2D (weapon) overlays the body using the same cell index. These
13	# consts live in the base class for this iteration because we only have one
14	# enemy type (enemy_basic). If a future enemy type wants its own sheets, move
15	# these into the subclass and let base expose abstract accessors.
16	# See sprites/SPRITES.md for the per-cell stance spec.
17	const SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/enemy_basic.png")
18	const WEAPON_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/enemy_basic_weapon.png")
19	const SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(32, 32)
20	const SPRITE_SCALE := 8.0
21	const SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE := Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)
22	const SPRITE_INDEX := {
23		&"idle": 0,
24		&"threat_weak": 1,
25		&"threat_strong": 2,
26		&"recovery_weak": 3,
27		&"recovery_strong": 4,
28		&"exhausted": 5,
29		&"staggered": 5,  # reuse exhausted cell, distinguished by cyan tint
30	}
31	
32	# Readability tints + execute (modulate-only, no new cells). Priority order
33	# (highest first): hit_flash > staggered > threat pulse > execute > white.
34	const THREAT_PULSE_TICKS := 2
35	const STAGGER_MODULATE := Color(0.5, 0.85, 1.0, 1.0)
36	const THREAT_PULSE_MODULATE := Color(1.7, 1.5, 0.5, 1.0)
37	const EXECUTE_MODULATE := Color(1.35, 0.55, 0.55, 1.0)
38	
39	# Floating HP + fatigue bars above the body. Drawn here in _draw() (the sprite
40	# child node draws separately and sits visually below — bars are above body
41	# anyway at y_offset=-82/-70 so there's no overlap).
42	const HP_BAR_SIZE := Vector2(120, 10)
43	const HP_BAR_OFFSET_Y := -150.0  # bar top-left.y, relative to enemy center
44	const FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE := Vector2(120, 6)
45	const FATIGUE_BAR_OFFSET_Y := -138.0  # sits 2 px below HP bar
46	const COLOR_BAR_BG := Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 1.0)
47	const COLOR_HP_BAR_FILL := Color(0.85, 0.2, 0.2, 1.0)
48	const COLOR_FATIGUE_BAR_FILL := Color(0.95, 0.85, 0.25, 1.0)
49	
50	var rng := RandomNumberGenerator.new()
51	var sprite: Sprite2D
52	var weapon_sprite: Sprite2D
53	
54	# Set true for exactly one tick when threat phase resolves into a swing.
55	var swing_this_tick: bool = false
56	# Which attack was telegraphed — &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
57	var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"
58	# Set true when the current weak threat is a feint — telegraphs identically but
59	# does NOT swing at the resolve tick (snaps to a short idle instead).
60	var is_feint: bool = false
61	# Counts down from THREAT_PULSE_TICKS so the sprite flashes bright yellow on
62	# threat onset (readability cue). Pure presentation.
63	var threat_pulse_ticks: int = 0
64	
65	
66	func _ready() -> void:
67		rng.randomize()
68		sprite = _make_sprite(SPRITE_SHEET)
69		add_child(sprite)
70		# weapon_sprite added after body → drawn on top in same _draw pass.
71		weapon_sprite = _make_sprite(WEAPON_SHEET)
72		add_child(weapon_sprite)
73		# Start idle.
74		_enter_idle()
75	
76	
77	func _make_sprite(sheet: Texture2D) -> Sprite2D:
78		var s := Sprite2D.new()
79		s.texture = sheet
80		s.region_enabled = true
81		s.region_rect = Rect2(0, 0, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
82		s.scale = Vector2(SPRITE_SCALE, SPRITE_SCALE)
83		s.texture_filter = CanvasItem.TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST
84		return s
85	
86	
87	func _draw() -> void:
88		# Floating HP bar above the enemy body.
89		var hp_origin := Vector2(-HP_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, HP_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
90		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, HP_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
91		var hp_pct: float = float(hp) / float(Balance.hp_max)
92		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, Vector2(HP_BAR_SIZE.x * hp_pct, HP_BAR_SIZE.y)),
93				COLOR_HP_BAR_FILL)
94	
95		# Floating fatigue bar, just below the HP bar.
96		var fat_origin := Vector2(-FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, FATIGUE_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
97		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
98		var fat_pct: float = float(fatigue) / float(Balance.fatigue_max)
99		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * fat_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)),
100				COLOR_FATIGUE_BAR_FILL)
101	
102	
103	func tick() -> void:
104		swing_this_tick = false
105		if threat_pulse_ticks > 0:
106			threat_pulse_ticks -= 1
107		super.tick()
108		if state_expired_this_tick:
109			_advance_state_after_expiry()
110		elif (state == &"threat_weak" or state == &"threat_strong") and state_ticks_remaining == 0 and not is_feint:
111			# Defensive: if countdown landed exactly on zero before expiry flag
112			# (shouldn't happen since tick() sets the flag, but keep safe).
113			# Feints never swing — guarded by `not is_feint`.
114			swing_this_tick = true
115		_update_sprite()
116	
117	
118	func _advance_state_after_expiry() -> void:
119		# Called the same tick the previous state expired.
120		match state:
121			&"idle":
122				_decide_attack()
123			&"threat_weak":
124				if is_feint:
125					# Feint: telegraphed but never swings. Snap to a short idle
126					# (feint recovery) and re-decide on expiry.
127					is_feint = false
128					set_state(&"idle", _feint_idle_ticks())
129				else:
130					# Last tick of threat = swing event.
131					swing_this_tick = true
132					set_state(&"recovery_weak", _recovery_weak_ticks())
133			&"threat_strong":
134				swing_this_tick = true
135				set_state(&"recovery_strong", _recovery_strong_ticks())
136			&"recovery_weak", &"recovery_strong":
137				_enter_idle()
138			&"staggered":
139				_enter_idle()
140			&"exhausted":
141				fatigue = Balance.fatigue_max
142				_enter_idle()
143			_:
144				_enter_idle()
145	
146	
147	func _enter_idle() -> void:
148		set_state(&"idle", _pick_idle_duration(rng))
149		pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
150		is_feint = false  # safety: never carry a feint flag across an idle
151	
152	
153	# Perfect-parried by the player → wide-open, cannot act, all hits land.
154	func enter_stagger() -> void:
155		is_feint = false
156		set_state(&"staggered", _stagger_ticks())
157	
158	
159	func _decide_attack() -> void:
160		pending_attack_kind = _pick_attack(rng)
161		# Strong attacks never feint; only weak threats can be a feint.
162		is_feint = (pending_attack_kind == &"weak" and rng.randf() < _feint_probability())
163		if pending_attack_kind == &"strong":
164			var t: int = _threat_strong_ticks()
165			set_state(&"threat_strong", t)
166		else:
167			var tw: int = _threat_weak_ticks()
168			set_state(&"threat_weak", tw)
169		threat_pulse_ticks = THREAT_PULSE_TICKS
170	
171	
172	# Called by fight.gd when fatigue drops to 0 outside of exhausted.
173	func enter_exhausted() -> void:
174		set_state(&"exhausted", _exhausted_ticks())
175	
176	
177	# --- Sprite helpers ------------------------------------------------------
178	
179	func _update_sprite() -> void:
180		# Enemy has no sub-stances — state maps 1:1 to a cell index.
181		var idx: int = SPRITE_INDEX.get(state, 0)
182		var rect := Rect2(idx * SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, 0,
183				SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
184		# Modulate priority (highest first): hit_flash > staggered > threat pulse
185		# > execute > white.
186		var mod: Color
187		if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
188			mod = SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE
189		elif state == &"staggered":
190			mod = STAGGER_MODULATE
191		elif threat_pulse_ticks > 0:
192			mod = THREAT_PULSE_MODULATE
193		elif hp <= Balance.execute_threshold_hp:
194			mod = EXECUTE_MODULATE
195		else:
196			mod = Color.WHITE
197		sprite.region_rect = rect
198		sprite.modulate = mod
199		weapon_sprite.region_rect = rect
200		weapon_sprite.modulate = mod
201	
202	
203	# --- Abstract hooks ------------------------------------------------------
204	
205	func _pick_attack(_rng: RandomNumberGenerator) -> StringName:
206		# Override in subclass.
207		return &"weak"
208	
209	
210	func _pick_idle_duration(_rng: RandomNumberGenerator) -> int:
211		# Override in subclass.
212		return 48
213	
214	
215	# --- Tunable accessors (overridable) -------------------------------------
216	
217	func _threat_weak_ticks() -> int:
218		return 24
219	
220	
221	func _threat_strong_ticks() -> int:
222		return 32
223	
224	
225	func _recovery_weak_ticks() -> int:
226		return 8
227	
228	
229	func _recovery_strong_ticks() -> int:
230		return 16
231	
232	
233	func _exhausted_ticks() -> int:
234		return 64
235	
236	
237	func _stagger_ticks() -> int:
238		return 12
239	
240	
241	func _feint_probability() -> float:
242		return 0.0
243	
244	
245	func _feint_idle_ticks() -> int:
246		return 6

1	class_name Combatant
2	extends Node2D
3	
4	# Base stateful entity. Holds hp, fatigue, current state and remaining ticks.
5	# Subclasses (Player, Enemy) decide transitions; this base only owns the
6	# countdown and getters/setters.
7	
8	var hp: int = Balance.hp_max
9	var fatigue: int = Balance.fatigue_max
10	var state: StringName = &"idle"
11	var state_ticks_remaining: int = 0
12	
13	# True for exactly one tick when state transitions on its own due to countdown.
14	# Subclasses can also set their own "swing_this_tick" flag for tick-precise events.
15	var state_expired_this_tick: bool = false
16	
17	# Polish: white-flash overlay when this combatant gets hit. Ticked down here;
18	# subclass _draw() overrides body colour while > 0.
19	var hit_flash_ticks: int = 0
20	
21	
22	func set_state(new_state: StringName, ticks: int) -> void:
23		state = new_state
24		state_ticks_remaining = ticks
25	
26	
27	func trigger_flash(ticks: int) -> void:
28		hit_flash_ticks = ticks
29		queue_redraw()
30	
31	
32	func tick() -> void:
33		state_expired_this_tick = false
34		if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
35			hit_flash_ticks -= 1
36			queue_redraw()  # repaint as flash starts and again when it ends
37		if state_ticks_remaining > 0:
38			state_ticks_remaining -= 1
39			if state_ticks_remaining <= 0:
40				state_expired_this_tick = true
41	
42	
43	func damage_hp(amount: int) -> void:
44		hp = clampi(hp - amount, 0, Balance.hp_max)
45		queue_redraw()
46	
47	
48	func heal_hp(amount: int) -> void:
49		hp = clampi(hp + amount, 0, Balance.hp_max)
50		queue_redraw()
51	
52	
53	func add_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
54		fatigue = clampi(fatigue + amount, 0, Balance.fatigue_max)
55		queue_redraw()
56	
57	
58	func drain_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
59		fatigue = clampi(fatigue - amount, 0, Balance.fatigue_max)
60		queue_redraw()

1	extends Combatant
2	
3	# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
4	# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.
5	
6	# Gameplay tunables (timing, cooldowns, parry window) live in `balance.json`
7	# and are accessed via the `Balance` autoload. Only visual / layout constants
8	# remain as `const` below.
9	
10	# --- Sprite rendering ----------------------------------------------------
11	# Player body = Sprite2D with region_rect cell-picker. Each FSM stance
12	# (including derived sub-stances) maps to exactly one cell in the strip.
13	# A second Sprite2D (weapon) overlays the body using the same cell index —
14	# weapon sheet has the same layout, just a separate texture.
15	# See sprites/SPRITES.md for the per-cell stance spec.
16	const SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player.png")
17	const WEAPON_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/player_weapon.png")
18	const SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(32, 32)
19	const SPRITE_SCALE := 8.0
20	const SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE := Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)
21	# Golden brightened tint while a riposte is armed.
22	const SPRITE_RIPOSTE_MODULATE := Color(1.6, 1.35, 0.4, 1.0)
23	const SPRITE_INDEX := {
24		&"idle": 0,
25		&"attacking_weak": 1,
26		&"attacking_strong_windup": 2,
27		&"attacking_strong_recovery": 3,
28		&"blocking_active": 4,
29		&"blocking_passive": 5,
30		&"dodging": 6,
31	}
32	
33	var sprite: Sprite2D
34	var weapon_sprite: Sprite2D
35	
36	# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
37	var swing_this_tick: bool = false
38	# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
39	var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"
40	
41	# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
42	# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
43	var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0
44	
45	# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
46	var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0
47	
48	# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
49	# while still on cooldown).
50	var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0
51	
52	# Tracks weak-attack cooldown (counted alongside the attacking_weak state — by
53	# the time we're back in idle, this still has a few ticks left to gate spam).
54	var weak_cooldown_ticks: int = 0
55	
56	# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
57	var dodge_invincible: bool = false
58	
59	# --- Riposte & combo -----------------------------------------------------
60	# Active parry arms a riposte: while riposte_ready_ticks > 0, the next damaging
61	# hit is multiplied by Balance.riposte_damage_multiplier, then consumed.
62	var riposte_ready_ticks: int = 0
63	# Combo = consecutive damaging hits; resets on getting hit or on timeout.
64	var combo: int = 0
65	var combo_timer_ticks: int = 0
66	var max_combo: int = 0
67	
68	
69	func _ready() -> void:
70		sprite = _make_sprite(SPRITE_SHEET)
71		add_child(sprite)
72		# weapon_sprite added after body → drawn on top in same _draw pass.
73		weapon_sprite = _make_sprite(WEAPON_SHEET)
74		add_child(weapon_sprite)
75		set_state(&"idle", 0)
76		_update_sprite()
77	
78	
79	func _make_sprite(sheet: Texture2D) -> Sprite2D:
80		var s := Sprite2D.new()
81		s.texture = sheet
82		s.region_enabled = true
83		s.region_rect = Rect2(0, 0, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
84		s.scale = Vector2(SPRITE_SCALE, SPRITE_SCALE)
85		s.texture_filter = CanvasItem.TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST
86		return s
87	
88	
89	# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
90	# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
91	func tick() -> void:
92		swing_this_tick = false
93		if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
94			dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1
95		if weak_cooldown_ticks > 0:
96			weak_cooldown_ticks -= 1
97	
98		# Riposte window expires on its own; sprite is refreshed at end of tick.
99		if riposte_ready_ticks > 0:
100			riposte_ready_ticks -= 1
101	
102		# Combo decays if no damaging hit lands within combo_timeout_ticks.
103		if combo_timer_ticks > 0:
104			combo_timer_ticks -= 1
105			if combo_timer_ticks == 0:
106				combo = 0
107	
108		# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
109		# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
110		# same `attacking_*` state.
111		if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
112			if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
113				windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
114				if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
115					# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
116					swing_this_tick = true
117	
118		# Track block age for parry window — only the first block_active_ticks of a
119		# block drain enemy fatigue.
120		if state == &"blocking":
121			blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1
122	
123		# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
124		if state == &"dodging":
125			# Invincibility lasts the first dodge_invincibility ticks of the
126			# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
127			var elapsed: int = Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover - state_ticks_remaining
128			dodge_invincible = elapsed < Balance.dodge_invincibility
129	
130		super.tick()
131	
132		if state_expired_this_tick:
133			_on_state_expired()
134	
135		_update_sprite()
136	
137	
138	func _on_state_expired() -> void:
139		match state:
140			&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
141				dodge_invincible = false
142				set_state(&"idle", 0)
143			_:
144				pass
145	
146	
147	# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
148	# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
149	# grid.
150	func handle_input() -> void:
151		# Inputs are only accepted in idle or blocking states. attacking_* and
152		# dodging swallow input until they finish.
153		# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Right = fast weak attack, Up =
154		# strong attack, Down (hold) = block, Left (tap) = dodge.
155		match state:
156			&"idle":
157				# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
158				# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
159				# the same tick.
160				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
161					set_state(&"blocking", 0)
162					blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
163					_update_sprite()
164					return
165				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT) and weak_cooldown_ticks == 0:
166					_begin_attack(&"weak")
167					return
168				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
169					_begin_attack(&"strong")
170					return
171				if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
172					_begin_dodge()
173					return
174			&"blocking":
175				if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
176					set_state(&"idle", 0)
177					_update_sprite()
178	
179	
180	func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
181		pending_attack_kind = kind
182		var windup: int
183		var recover: int
184		if kind == &"weak":
185			windup = Balance.attack_weak_windup
186			recover = Balance.attack_weak_recover
187			set_state(&"attacking_weak", windup + recover)
188			weak_cooldown_ticks = Balance.attack_weak_cooldown
189		else:
190			windup = Balance.attack_strong_windup
191			recover = Balance.attack_strong_recover
192			set_state(&"attacking_strong", windup + recover)
193		windup_ticks_remaining = windup
194	
195		# Zero-windup attacks (weak) swing instantly this tick.
196		if windup == 0:
197			swing_this_tick = true
198		_update_sprite()
199	
200	
201	func _begin_dodge() -> void:
202		set_state(&"dodging", Balance.dodge_invincibility + Balance.dodge_recover)
203		dodge_invincible = true
204		dodge_cooldown_ticks = Balance.dodge_cooldown
205		_update_sprite()
206	
207	
208	func is_active_block() -> bool:
209		return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < Balance.block_active_ticks
210	
211	
212	func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
213		if state != &"blocking":
214			return 0
215		return maxi(0, Balance.block_active_ticks - blocking_ticks_elapsed)
216	
217	
218	# --- Riposte -------------------------------------------------------------
219	
220	func set_riposte_ready() -> void:
221		riposte_ready_ticks = Balance.riposte_window_ticks
222		_update_sprite()
223	
224	
225	func is_riposte_ready() -> bool:
226		return riposte_ready_ticks > 0
227	
228	
229	func consume_riposte() -> void:
230		riposte_ready_ticks = 0
231		_update_sprite()
232	
233	
234	# Perfect parry = block was started within the last perfect_parry_ticks ticks
235	# at the moment the weak swing resolves (strict subset of active parry).
236	func is_perfect_parry() -> bool:
237		return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed <= Balance.perfect_parry_ticks
238	
239	
240	# --- Combo & rank --------------------------------------------------------
241	
242	func add_combo() -> void:
243		combo += 1
244		max_combo = maxi(max_combo, combo)
245		combo_timer_ticks = Balance.combo_timeout_ticks
246	
247	
248	func reset_combo() -> void:
249		combo = 0
250		combo_timer_ticks = 0
251	
252	
253	func combo_rank() -> StringName:
254		if combo >= 15:
255			return &"S"
256		elif combo >= 10:
257			return &"A"
258		elif combo >= 5:
259			return &"B"
260		elif combo >= 1:
261			return &"C"
262		return &""
263	
264	
265	# --- Sprite helpers ------------------------------------------------------
266	
267	func _current_visual_stance() -> StringName:
268		match state:
269			&"attacking_strong":
270				return &"attacking_strong_windup" if windup_ticks_remaining > 0 else &"attacking_strong_recovery"
271			&"blocking":
272				return &"blocking_active" if is_active_block() else &"blocking_passive"
273			_:
274				return state
275	
276	
277	func _update_sprite() -> void:
278		var idx: int = SPRITE_INDEX.get(_current_visual_stance(), 0)
279		var rect := Rect2(idx * SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, 0,
280				SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.x, SPRITE_CELL_SIZE.y)
281		# Modulate priority: hit_flash > riposte-ready > WHITE.
282		var mod: Color
283		if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
284			mod = SPRITE_HIT_FLASH_MODULATE
285		elif riposte_ready_ticks > 0:
286			mod = SPRITE_RIPOSTE_MODULATE
287		else:
288			mod = Color.WHITE
289		sprite.region_rect = rect
290		sprite.modulate = mod
291		weapon_sprite.region_rect = rect
292		weapon_sprite.modulate = mod

2	
3	# HUD: debug state text + win overlay.
4	# Enemy HP and fatigue bars float above the enemy — drawn in enemy.gd.
5	# Pure _draw on a Control child — no ColorRect nodes, kept simple/scriptable.
6	
7	const COLOR_TEXT := Color(0.9, 0.9, 0.95, 1.0)
8	const COLOR_TEXT_DIM := Color(0.65, 0.65, 0.75, 1.0)
9	
10	# Combo rank colors (top-center combo + rank, win overlay max combo).
11	const COLOR_RANK_C := Color(0.95, 0.9, 0.4)
12	const COLOR_RANK_B := Color(0.4, 0.85, 1.0)
13	const COLOR_RANK_A := Color(1.0, 0.7, 0.2)
14	const COLOR_RANK_S := Color(1.0, 0.35, 0.35)
15	
16	const VIEWPORT_W := 720
17	const VIEWPORT_H := 1280
18	
19	var enemy_hp: int = 100
20	var enemy_fatigue: int = 100
21	var enemy_state: StringName = &"idle"
22	var enemy_state_ticks: int = 0
23	var player_state: StringName = &"idle"
24	var player_state_ticks: int = 0
25	var dodge_cd: int = 0
26	var show_win: bool = false
27	var combo: int = 0
28	var combo_rank: StringName = &""
29	var max_combo: int = 0
30	
31	var _canvas: Control
32	
33	
34	func _ready() -> void:
35		_canvas = Control.new()
36		_canvas.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
37		_canvas.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
38		_canvas.draw.connect(_on_canvas_draw)
39		add_child(_canvas)
40	
41	
42	func update(p_enemy_hp: int, p_enemy_fatigue: int, p_enemy_state: StringName,
43			p_enemy_state_ticks: int, p_player_state: StringName, p_player_state_ticks: int,
44			p_dodge_cd: int, p_show_win: bool, p_combo: int, p_combo_rank: StringName,
45			p_max_combo: int) -> void:
46		enemy_hp = p_enemy_hp
47		enemy_fatigue = p_enemy_fatigue
48		enemy_state = p_enemy_state
49		enemy_state_ticks = p_enemy_state_ticks
50		player_state = p_player_state
51		player_state_ticks = p_player_state_ticks
52		dodge_cd = p_dodge_cd
53		show_win = p_show_win
54		combo = p_combo
55		combo_rank = p_combo_rank
56		max_combo = p_max_combo
57		if _canvas:
58			_canvas.queue_redraw()
59	
60	
61	func _on_canvas_draw() -> void:
62		# Debug text (bottom-left): combatant states.
63		var font := ThemeDB.fallback_font
64		var fsz: int = 18
65		var x: float = 20.0
66		var y: float = VIEWPORT_H - 160
67		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
68				"enemy: %s (%d)" % [String(enemy_state), enemy_state_ticks],
69				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)
70		y += 22
71		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
72				"  hp=%d  fatigue=%d" % [enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue],
73				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)
74		y += 22
75		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
76				"player: %s (%d)  dodge_cd=%d" % [String(player_state), player_state_ticks, dodge_cd],
77				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)
78	
79		# Key hints.
80		y = VIEWPORT_H - 60
81		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
82				"^=strong  >=weak  v=block  <=dodge",
83				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, 16, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)
84	
85		# Combo + rank (top-center) — only while combo >= 1.
86		if combo >= 1:
87			var rank_col: Color = _rank_color(combo_rank)
88			var combo_text := "x%d" % combo
89			var combo_fsz: int = 46
90			var combo_size := font.get_string_size(combo_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, combo_fsz)
91			var cx: float = (VIEWPORT_W - combo_size.x) * 0.5
92			var cy: float = 90.0
93			_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(cx, cy), combo_text,
94					HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, combo_fsz, rank_col)
95			var rank_str := String(combo_rank)
96			if rank_str != "":
97				var rank_fsz: int = 34
98				var rank_size := font.get_string_size(rank_str, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, rank_fsz)
99				var rx: float = (VIEWPORT_W - rank_size.x) * 0.5
100				_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(rx, cy + 38), rank_str,
101						HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, rank_fsz, rank_col)
102	
103		# Win overlay.
104		if show_win:
105			var overlay_color := Color(0, 0, 0, 0.55)
106			_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2.ZERO, Vector2(VIEWPORT_W, VIEWPORT_H)), overlay_color)
107			var label_size: int = 96
108			var win_text := "VYHRA"
109			var text_size := font.get_string_size(win_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size)
110			var tx: float = (VIEWPORT_W - text_size.x) * 0.5
111			var ty: float = VIEWPORT_H * 0.5
112			_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(tx, ty), win_text,
113					HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size,
114					Color(1.0, 0.95, 0.5, 1.0))
115			var hint := "Space = restart"
116			var hint_size := font.get_string_size(hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24)
117			_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2((VIEWPORT_W - hint_size.x) * 0.5, ty + 60),
118					hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24, COLOR_TEXT)
119			# Max combo + rank for the session best.
120			var mc_rank: StringName = _rank_for(max_combo)
121			var mc_text := "Max combo: %d  [%s]" % [max_combo, String(mc_rank)]
122			var mc_fsz: int = 28
123			var mc_size := font.get_string_size(mc_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, mc_fsz)
124			_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2((VIEWPORT_W - mc_size.x) * 0.5, ty + 100),
125					mc_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, mc_fsz, _rank_color(mc_rank))
126	
127	
128	func _rank_for(c: int) -> StringName:
129		if c >= 15:
130			return &"S"
131		elif c >= 10:
132			return &"A"
133		elif c >= 5:
134			return &"B"
135		elif c >= 1:
136			return &"C"
137		return &""
138	
139	
140	func _rank_color(rank: StringName) -> Color:
141		match rank:
142			&"S":
143				return COLOR_RANK_S
144			&"A":
145				return COLOR_RANK_A
146			&"B":
147				return COLOR_RANK_B
148			&"C":
149				return COLOR_RANK_C
150			_:
151				return COLOR_TEXT_DIM

3	# Autoload singleton (registered as `Balance` in project.godot).
4	# Loads gameplay tunables from `res://balance.json` at startup.
5	# Editace JSONu + restart aplikuje změny bez recompilu.
6	# Vizuální / animační / architektonické konstanty zůstávají jako `const`
7	# v příslušných skriptech (TICKS_PER_SECOND, SPRITE_*, bar dims, atd.).
8	#
9	# Defaults below mirror balance.json — they serve as fallback if the file
10	# is missing or malformed (we push_error but do NOT crash).
11	
12	# Combatant
13	var hp_max: int = 100
14	var fatigue_max: int = 40
15	
16	# Player
17	var attack_weak_windup: int = 0
18	var attack_weak_recover: int = 4
19	var attack_weak_cooldown: int = 12
20	var attack_strong_windup: int = 6
21	var attack_strong_recover: int = 10
22	var dodge_invincibility: int = 6
23	var dodge_recover: int = 2
24	var dodge_cooldown: int = 24
25	var block_active_ticks: int = 8
26	var riposte_window_ticks: int = 14
27	var riposte_damage_multiplier: float = 1.6
28	var perfect_parry_ticks: int = 3
29	
30	# Enemy basic
31	var threat_weak_ticks: int = 8
32	var threat_strong_ticks: int = 12
33	var recovery_weak_ticks: int = 8
34	var recovery_strong_ticks: int = 16
35	var exhausted_ticks: int = 48
36	var idle_min_ticks: int = 12
37	var idle_max_ticks: int = 48
38	var strong_probability: float = 0.15
39	var stagger_ticks: int = 16
40	var feint_probability: float = 0.15
41	var feint_idle_ticks: int = 6
42	
43	# Fight resolves
44	var hp_damage_weak: int = 15
45	var hp_damage_strong: int = 25
46	var enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak: int = 10
47	var enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle: int = 10

49	var enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit: int = 30

52	var execute_damage_multiplier: float = 1.5

56	var hitstop_weak: float = 0.04
57	var hitstop_strong: float = 0.10
58	var hitstop_parry: float = 0.08
59	var hitstop_stagger: float = 0.14

61	
62	func _ready() -> void:
63		_load_balance()
64	
65	
66	func _load_balance() -> void:
67		const PATH := "res://balance.json"
68		if not FileAccess.file_exists(PATH):
69			push_error("Balance: %s not found — using defaults." % PATH)
70			return
71		var file := FileAccess.open(PATH, FileAccess.READ)
72		if file == null:
73			push_error("Balance: failed to open %s (err=%d) — using defaults."
74					% [PATH, FileAccess.get_open_error()])
75			return
76		var text := file.get_as_text()
77		file.close()
78		var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(text)
79		if parsed == null or not (parsed is Dictionary):
80			push_error("Balance: failed to parse %s as JSON object — using defaults." % PATH)
81			return
82		var data: Dictionary = parsed
83	
84		var combatant: Dictionary = data.get("combatant", {}) as Dictionary
85		hp_max = int(combatant.get("hp_max", hp_max))
86		fatigue_max = int(combatant.get("fatigue_max", fatigue_max))
87	
88		var player: Dictionary = data.get("player", {}) as Dictionary
89		attack_weak_windup = int(player.get("attack_weak_windup", attack_weak_windup))
90		attack_weak_recover = int(player.get("attack_weak_recover", attack_weak_recover))
91		attack_weak_cooldown = int(player.get("attack_weak_cooldown", attack_weak_cooldown))
92		attack_strong_windup = int(player.get("attack_strong_windup", attack_strong_windup))
93		attack_strong_recover = int(player.get("attack_strong_recover", attack_strong_recover))
94		dodge_invincibility = int(player.get("dodge_invincibility", dodge_invincibility))
95		dodge_recover = int(player.get("dodge_recover", dodge_recover))
96		dodge_cooldown = int(player.get("dodge_cooldown", dodge_cooldown))
97		block_active_ticks = int(player.get("block_active_ticks", block_active_ticks))
98		riposte_window_ticks = int(player.get("riposte_window_ticks", riposte_window_ticks))
99		riposte_damage_multiplier = float(player.get("riposte_damage_multiplier", riposte_damage_multiplier))
100		perfect_parry_ticks = int(player.get("perfect_parry_ticks", perfect_parry_ticks))
101	
102		var enemy_basic: Dictionary = data.get("enemy_basic", {}) as Dictionary
103		threat_weak_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("threat_weak_ticks", threat_weak_ticks))
104		threat_strong_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("threat_strong_ticks", threat_strong_ticks))
105		recovery_weak_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("recovery_weak_ticks", recovery_weak_ticks))
106		recovery_strong_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("recovery_strong_ticks", recovery_strong_ticks))
107		exhausted_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("exhausted_ticks", exhausted_ticks))
108		idle_min_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("idle_min_ticks", idle_min_ticks))
109		idle_max_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("idle_max_ticks", idle_max_ticks))
110		strong_probability = float(enemy_basic.get("strong_probability", strong_probability))
111		stagger_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("stagger_ticks", stagger_ticks))
112		feint_probability = float(enemy_basic.get("feint_probability", feint_probability))
113		feint_idle_ticks = int(enemy_basic.get("feint_idle_ticks", feint_idle_ticks))
114	
115		var fight: Dictionary = data.get("fight", {}) as Dictionary
116		hp_damage_weak = int(fight.get("hp_damage_weak", hp_damage_weak))
117		hp_damage_strong = int(fight.get("hp_damage_strong", hp_damage_strong))
118		enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak = int(fight.get("enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak", enemy_fatigue_blocked_weak))
119		enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle = int(fight.get("enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle", enemy_fatigue_player_strong_idle))
120		enemy_hp_regen_on_hit = int(fight.get("enemy_hp_regen_on_hit", enemy_hp_regen_on_hit))
121		enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit = int(fight.get("enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit", enemy_fatigue_regen_on_hit))
122		hit_flash_ticks = int(fight.get("hit_flash_ticks", hit_flash_ticks))
123		execute_threshold_hp = int(fight.get("execute_threshold_hp", execute_threshold_hp))
124		execute_damage_multiplier = float(fight.get("execute_damage_multiplier", execute_damage_multiplier))
125		combo_timeout_ticks = int(fight.get("combo_timeout_ticks", combo_timeout_ticks))
126	
127		var fx: Dictionary = data.get("fx", {}) as Dictionary
128		hitstop_weak = float(fx.get("hitstop_weak", hitstop_weak))
129		hitstop_strong = float(fx.get("hitstop_strong", hitstop_strong))
130		hitstop_parry = float(fx.get("hitstop_parry", hitstop_parry))
131		hitstop_stagger = float(fx.get("hitstop_stagger", hitstop_stagger))

1	# Sprites — Stance sheet specification
2	
3	Combatanti se renderují jako jednoduchý `Sprite2D` s `region_rect` výřezem z jednoho spritesheetu na postavu. Každý FSM stance odpovídá právě jedné buňce v sheetu — žádné inter-pose animace (žádné lerpy, žádný `AnimationPlayer`). Změna stancu = swap `region_rect` na hranici ticku.
4	
5	## Globální pravidla
6	
7	- **Layout:** horizontální strip, buňky v pořadí indexu (idx 0 = nejlevější).
8	- **Pixel-perfect rendering:** `texture_filter = NEAREST` (nastaveno v `_ready()` v `player.gd` / `enemy.gd`). Žádná anti-alias, žádné mipmapy.
9	- **Display scale:** ×8 (`SPRITE_SCALE` v `player.gd` / `enemy.gd`). 32px cell → 256px na obrazovce.
10	- **Hit flash:** `sprite.modulate = Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)` po dobu `hit_flash_ticks > 0`. Žádný extra draw — jen modulate boost.
11	- **Cell size:** **32×32 px** pro všechny postavy v této iteraci (player i enemy basic). Cell size je deklarován v `SPRITE_CELL_SIZE` v každém `.gd` — per-character variace zůstává možná, ale výchozí je čtvercový 32px frame.
12	- **Dummy sheety jsou vyplněné jednou barvou s 1px černým rámečkem** — rámeček je pouze pro vizuální orientaci v debug a v reálném artu nemusí (a typicky nebude) existovat. Reálný pixel-art má vyplnit celé buňky 24×N do okraje.
13	
14	## Body vs. weapon sheety
15	
16	Každý character má **dva sheety**:
17	1. `<character>.png` — tělo / postava (drawn jako spodní vrstva).
18	2. `<character>_weapon.png` — zbraň (drawn jako vrchní vrstva, **přesně stejný layout, stejný počet cell, stejné pořadí stancí**).
19	
20	Index cell se počítá jednou v `_update_sprite()` a aplikuje na oba `Sprite2D` současně — to znamená, že zbraň musí mít cell pro každý stance ve stejném pořadí jako tělo. Pokud daný stance nemá zbraň zobrazenou (např. dodging), buňka v `_weapon.png` může být čistě průhledná. Hit flash modulate se aplikuje na obě vrstvy.
21	
22	## `player.png` + `player_weapon.png` — 224×32 px (7 cells × 32×32)
23	
24	| Idx | Stance | Když se zobrazí |
25	|---:|---|---|
26	| 0 | `idle` | `state == &"idle"` |
27	| 1 | `attacking_weak` | `state == &"attacking_weak"` (instant swing — celý state) |
28	| 2 | `attacking_strong_windup` | `state == &"attacking_strong"` AND `windup_ticks_remaining > 0` |
29	| 3 | `attacking_strong_recovery` | `state == &"attacking_strong"` AND `windup_ticks_remaining == 0` |
30	| 4 | `blocking_active` | `state == &"blocking"` AND `is_active_block()` (prvních 8 ticků) |
31	| 5 | `blocking_passive` | `state == &"blocking"` po vypršení active parry window |
32	| 6 | `dodging` | `state == &"dodging"` (kryje invincibility i recovery sub-fázi) |
33	
34	Sub-stance pro player jsou odvozené v `_current_visual_stance()` v `player.gd`. FSM zná pouze 4 hlavní stavy (`idle`, `attacking_weak`, `attacking_strong`, `blocking`, `dodging`), vizuál ale rozlišuje 7 cell.
35	
36	## `enemy_basic.png` + `enemy_basic_weapon.png` — 192×32 px (6 cells × 32×32)
37	
38	| Idx | Stance | Když se zobrazí |
39	|---:|---|---|
40	| 0 | `idle` | `state == &"idle"` |
41	| 1 | `threat_weak` | `state == &"threat_weak"` (napřah ke slabému seku) |
42	| 2 | `threat_strong` | `state == &"threat_strong"` (napřah ke silnému seku — typicky červený) |
43	| 3 | `recovery_weak` | `state == &"recovery_weak"` (po seku, krátké okno na trefu od hráče) |
44	| 4 | `recovery_strong` | `state == &"recovery_strong"` (delší okno po silném seku) |
45	| 5 | `exhausted` | `state == &"exhausted"` (fatigue = 0, dlouhá obnova) |
46	
47	Enemy nemá žádné sub-stance — mapování je 1:1 `state -> idx`, takže `_current_visual_stance()` zde není potřeba (stačí `state` přímo).
48	
49	Stav **`staggered`** (po perfect parry) **nemá vlastní buňku** — reusuje `exhausted` buňku (idx 5) a odlišuje se pouze cyan modulate tintem (viz „Readability tinty“ níže).
50	
51	## Readability tinty (modulate-only — žádné nové buňky)
52	
53	Nové vizuální stavy nepřidávají žádné buňky do sheetů — jsou to čistě `modulate` tinty aplikované na **obě** vrstvy (body + weapon), stejně jako hit flash:
54	
55	- **Enemy `staggered`** — cyan wash (`STAGGER_MODULATE ≈ Color(0.5, 0.85, 1.0, 1.0)`), reuse exhausted buňky idx 5.
56	- **Threat onset pulse** — vstup do `threat_weak` / `threat_strong` jasně žlutě (`THREAT_PULSE_MODULATE ≈ Color(1.7, 1.5, 0.5, 1.0)`) po dobu `THREAT_PULSE_TICKS` (≈ 2 ticky).
57	- **Execute** — `enemy.hp <= execute_threshold_hp` → ustálený načervenalý tint (`EXECUTE_MODULATE ≈ Color(1.35, 0.55, 0.55, 1.0)`).
58	- **Player riposte-ready** — `riposte_ready_ticks > 0` → golden brightened tint (`SPRITE_RIPOSTE_MODULATE ≈ Color(1.6, 1.35, 0.4, 1.0)`).
59	
60	**Modulate priorita (highest first):**
61	
62	1. `hit_flash` (`Color(2.5, 2.5, 2.5, 1.0)`)
63	2. player: riposte-ready  /  enemy: `staggered`
64	3. threat pulse
65	4. execute
66	5. `Color.WHITE` (default)
67	
68	V `_update_sprite()` se vybere první aktivní pravidlo a aplikuje na body i weapon sprite zároveň.
69	
70	## Přidání nové postavy / stancu
71	
72	1. Vytvoř nový PNG v `res://sprites/<character>.png` jako horizontální strip s N buňkami šířky `cell_w` a výšky `cell_h`.
73	2. V příslušném `.gd` upravs konstanty:
74	   - `SPRITE_SHEET := preload("res://sprites/<character>.png")`
75	   - `SPRITE_CELL_SIZE := Vector2i(cell_w, cell_h)` — base `enemy.gd` i `player.gd` čte cell size odsud, takže per-character variace je „zadarmo“.
76	   - `SPRITE_INDEX := { &"<stance>": <idx>, ... }`
77	3. Pokud potřebuješ sub-stance (např. nový enemy s windup/recovery rozdělením), přidej v `_current_visual_stance()` match větev.
78	4. Pro nový enemy type, který chce vlastní sheet: přesuň `SPRITE_SHEET` / `SPRITE_INDEX` / `SPRITE_CELL_SIZE` consts z `enemy.gd` do podtřídy a v base ponech abstract hooky (`_sprite_sheet()`, `_sprite_cell_size()`, `_sprite_index()`).
79	
80	## Import notes
81	
82	- Godot import: `texture_filter = NEAREST` je nastaven kódem v `_ready()`, není potřeba `.import` tweak.
83	- Sheet je `Sprite2D` s `region_enabled = true`. `region_rect` se přepisuje každý tick v `_update_sprite()`.
84	- Šířka sheetu = `cell_w * count`. Výška = `cell_h`. Pokud potřebuješ vícero řádků (např. směrové varianty), bude nutné rozšířit `region_rect` cell-picker (zatím není potřeba).
85	
86	## Reminder
87	
88	- Cell size je **per-character const** v `.gd` souboru. Pokud změníš dimenze sheetu, sync `SPRITE_CELL_SIZE` v kódu.
89	- Žádné inter-pose animace. Pokud chceš animovat během stancu, je potřeba rozšířit sheet o víc buněk a animovat indexem (out of scope pro tuto iteraci).
90	- Hit flash je čistě `modulate` — žádný separate damage sprite cell.
91	- Stejně tak **všechny readability tinty** (staggered cyan, threat pulse, execute red, riposte-ready gold) jsou pouze `modulate` boost / wash — žádné nové buňky, žádný extra draw. `staggered` reusuje exhausted buňku idx 5. Priority order viz sekce „Readability tinty“.
92

1	# CLAUDE.md — Glamdring
2	
3	Reaction-combat 1v1 hra v Godot 4.6 Mobile profilu. Player (stance sprite vlevo, zelené tóny) vs Enemy (stance sprite vpravo, šedo-červené tóny). Pevný timestep **16 ticků/s**.
4	Pro implementace pouzivej sub agenty at je hlavni context cistsi.
5	
6	## Autoritativní specifikace
7	
8	- **`gameplay.md`** — pravidla, FSM stavy, timingy, balance, swing resolve.
9	- **`plan.md`** — architektura souborů, tunable konstanty, stance sprite rendering, vizuální layout, verifikační scénáře.
10	- **`sprites/SPRITES.md`** — per-character spritesheet layout (cell index → stance).
11	
12	Před netriviální změnou si přečti oba soubory. Pokud upravuješ pravidla/timing, **synchronizuj s gameplay.md i plan.md** (linter to nedělá).
13	
14	## Project structure
15	
16	```
17	fight.tscn / fight.gd        — kořenová scéna + tick loop, swing resolves, HUD update, win check
18	combatant.gd                 — class_name Combatant (base: hp, fatigue, state, state_ticks_remaining)
19	enemy.gd                     — class_name Enemy extends Combatant (FSM transitions, abstract hooks)
20	enemy_basic.gd               — extends Enemy (per-type tunable konstanty)
21	player.gd                    — extends Combatant (input → state transitions)
22	hud.gd                       — CanvasLayer (HP/fatigue bary, debug state text, win overlay)
23	balance.json                 — runtime tunables (HP/fatigue caps, ticky, damage, cooldowns, AI prob.)
24	balance.gd                   — autoload singleton `Balance`, načítá balance.json při startu
25	sprites/                     — stance spritesheets (`player.png`, `enemy_basic.png`) + `SPRITES.md`
26	project.godot                — fight.tscn jako main_scene, 720×1280 portrait, stretch=viewport,
27	                               autoload Balance="*res://balance.gd"
28	```
29	
30	## Conventions
31	
32	- **Tick loop:** akumulátor v `fight.gd._process(delta)`; veškerá herní logika (state countdowny, AI, swing resolve, hit resolve) **výhradně** v `_on_tick()`. Vykreslování přes `queue_redraw()` na konci `_process`.
33	- **Tunable konstanty:** Herní balanc (ticky, damage, cooldowns, HP/fatigue caps, AI probabilities) je v `balance.json` v rootu projektu, načítaný autoloadem `Balance` při startu. Editace JSONu + restart aplikuje změny bez recompilu. Vizuální / animační / architektonické konstanty (`TICKS_PER_SECOND`, `SPRITE_SHEET`, `SPRITE_CELL_SIZE`, `SPRITE_SCALE`, `SPRITE_INDEX`, HP/fatigue bar dimensions, shake/particle hodnoty) zůstávají jako `const` v příslušném skriptu. Per-type AI tunables enemy (`threat_*_ticks`, `recovery_*_ticks`, `idle_*`, `strong_probability`) jsou v sekci `enemy_basic` JSONu.
34	- **Per-type overrides:** `enemy.gd` poskytuje defaults pro `_threat_*_ticks` apod. `enemy_basic.gd` je přepisuje a vrací hodnoty z `Balance.*`. Při ladění hodnot **edituj `balance.json`**, base `enemy.gd` zůstává s hardcoded defaults pro hypotetické budoucí typy.
35	- **No physics:** žádné `PhysicsBody`, `Area2D`, `CollisionShape`. Vše stavové; pokud potřeba kolize, ručně AABB/distance check.
36	- **Stance sprites:** Combatant = body `Sprite2D` + weapon `Sprite2D` overlay (oba s `region_rect` cell-pickerem nad horizontálním sheetem). Weapon sheet má identický layout jako body, takže index se počítá jednou a aplikuje na oba sprity. Každý FSM stance = jedna buňka. `SPRITE_INDEX` dict v každém `.gd` mapuje stance → cell index. Sub-stance (player active/passive block, strong windup/recovery) řeší `_current_visual_stance()`. Žádné inter-pose animace — pouze sprite swap na hranici ticku. Hit flash = `modulate * 2.5` na obě vrstvy. Spec stancí + sheet layouty viz `sprites/SPRITES.md`.
37	- **HUD constants:** bary používají `Balance.hp_max` / `Balance.fatigue_max` pro percenta — pokud změníš cap v `balance.json`, bar se škáluje automaticky.
38	- **Czech:** uživatel píše česky, technické termíny v EN. Komentáře v kódu mohou být kombinované (jak existuje).
39	
40	## Controls (v1 — keyboard only)
41	
42	| Klávesa | Akce |
43	|---|---|
44	| `→` (tap) | Fast weak attack (instant swing, 4t recovery, 12t cooldown, damage 15) |
45	| `↑` | Strong attack (6-tick telegraph + 10-tick recovery) |
46	| `↓` (hold) | Block — prvních 8t "active parry" (drain enemy fatigue při weak útoku) |
47	| `←` (tap) | Dodge (6t i-frames + 2t recover, 24t cooldown) |
48	| `Space` | Restart po výhře (mimo gameplay) |
49	
50	Touch input pro mobil je odložený TODO (viz plan.md "Mimo scope").
51	
52	## How to verify
53	
54	Otevři projekt v Godot 4.6 editoru, spusť `fight.tscn`. Manuální test scénáře v `plan.md` sekce **Verifikace** — projdi 1–9.
55	
56	## Working style
57	
58	- Když uživatel přidá / změní gameplay pravidlo: vždy aktualizuj **kód v glamdring** + **gameplay.md** + **plan.md** současně.
59	- Drobné implementační detaily (vizuál, barvy, anchor pozice) ne nutně do md — patří jen pokud mění herní pocit nebo design intent.
60	- Před commitem zkontroluj že md a kód jsou konzistentní (typicky: hodnoty v `balance.json`, klávesy, damage hodnoty).
61	- Glamdring **není git repo** (zatím) — uživatel commituje ručně nebo si ho založí.
62	
63	## Out of scope (v1)
64	
65	- Touch input pro mobil.
66	- Více typů nepřátel (base `Enemy` připravena, jen `enemy_basic` v této iteraci).
67	- Player stats / smrt (player invincible).
68	- Zvuky, hudba, particle efekty, screenshake.
69	- Sword sprity / AnimationPlayer (modulární API to umožní bez refaktoru).
70	- Persistence skóre, save game, menu / scene flow.

1	# Gameplay: Reakční souboj 1v1 (Fight Scene)
2	
3	> Popis pravidel a herní mechaniky. Implementační detaily viz `plan.md`.
4	
5	## Přehled
6	
7	1v1 reakční souboj. Vlevo zelený "player", vpravo bílý "enemy". Hra běží na pevném timestepu **16 ticků/s** — všechny časové parametry jsou v ticích. Mobilní portrétová orientace.
8	
9	**Cíl:** Dostat enemy `hp` na 0. Player v1 nesmrtelný. Pasivita je penalizována (zásah hráče regeneruje nepřítele).
10	
11	## Tick systém
12	
13	Veškerá herní logika běží na 16 Hz (≈62.5 ms/tick). Z toho se odvozují všechny délky stavů, telegrafů, útoků a cooldownů. Vykreslování běží na frame-rate displeje.
14	
15	## Enemy
16	
17	### Stats
18	- `hp = 100` (cap 100, min 0)
19	- `fatigue = 40` (cap 40, min 0)
20	
21	### Stavy
22	
23	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
24	|---|---|---|
25	| `idle` | 12–48 (random) | Čeká mezi útoky, blokuje útoky hráče |
26	| `threat_weak` | 8 | Meč napřažen pro slabý útok |
27	| `threat_strong` | 12 | Meč napřažen pro silný útok (vizuálně: enemy obarven červeně) |
28	| `recovery_weak` | 8 | Recovery po slabém seku, zranitelný |
29	| `recovery_strong` | 16 | Recovery po silném seku, zranitelný |
30	| `exhausted` | 48 | `fatigue == 0`; neútočí, neblokuje, všechny útoky zasáhnou |
31	| `staggered` | `stagger_ticks` (16) | Po **perfect parry** — wide open, nemůže nic dělat, všechny útoky zasáhnou. Vizuálně: cyan wash (reuse exhausted buňky). Po vypršení → `idle`. |
32	
33	### Přechody
34	
35	```
36	idle (po vypršení) ──► decide attack:
37	    ├─ 85 %: threat_weak  (8t) ──┬─ real ──► [swing] ──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──► idle
38	    │                            └─ feint (feint_probability) ──► idle (feint_idle_ticks) ──► re-decide
39	    └─ 15 %: threat_strong (12t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_strong (16t) ──► idle
40	
41	fatigue → 0 (kdykoli) ──► exhausted (48t) ──► idle (fatigue := 40)
42	perfect parry (viz Player) ──► staggered (stagger_ticks) ──► idle
43	```
44	
45	`[swing]` je instant 0-tick event na posledním ticku threat fáze.
46	
47	**Feint (AI mind-game):** Když enemy vybere **weak** útok, s pravděpodobností `feint_probability` (0.15) jde o **feint** — telegrafuje `threat_weak` identicky jako reálný útok, ale na swing ticku **nesekne**: místo toho snapne do krátkého `idle` (`feint_idle_ticks`, 6t) a poté znovu rozhoduje. Cílem je vybaitit předčasný blok / dodge. **Strong útok nikdy nefeintuje.**
48	
49	### Reakce v `idle` na útok hráče
50	
51	| Útok hráče | Enemy efekt |
52	|---|---|
53	| weak | žádný (zablokuje) |
54	| strong | `fatigue −= 10` (zablokuje se ztrátou) |
55	
56	Vizuální feedback: v obou případech enemy svým mečem **vykryje** (krátký flinch nahoru a zpět) — hráč tak vidí, že swing nedopadl, místo aby zíral na statického enemy.
57	
58	### Reakce v `recovery_*` / `exhausted` na útok hráče
59	
60	| Útok hráče | Efekt |
61	|---|---|
62	| weak | `enemy.hp −= 15` |
63	| strong | `enemy.hp −= 25` |
64	
65	### Reakce v `threat_*` na útok hráče
66	
67	Žádný efekt. Telegraph nelze přerušit.
68	
69	## Player
70	
71	### Stats (v1)
72	Žádné. Player je invincible.
73	
74	### Stavy
75	
76	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
77	|---|---|---|
78	| `idle` | — | Přijímá input |
79	| `attacking_weak` | 4 (instant swing + 4t recover), pak 12t cooldown | Rychlý slabý útok — žádný telegraph, swing na 1. ticku. Cooldown zahrnuje recovery, takže net čekání po návratu do `idle` je ~8t (0.5 s). |
80	| `attacking_strong` | 16 (6 windup + 10 recover) | Silný útok — krátký telegraph 6 ticků |
81	| `blocking` | dokud držíš `↓` | Obrana — prvních 8 ticků "active parry" (drainuje enemy fatigue při weak útoku **a aktivuje riposte**), dále jen pasivní (chrání, ale fatigue nedrainuje, žádné riposte). Re-press resetuje window. **Perfect parry** = block započal v posledních `perfect_parry_ticks` (3t) ticích → navíc enemy `staggered`. |
82	| `dodging` | 8 (6 invincibility + 2 recover), pak 24t cooldown | Úhyb |
83	
84	Během `attacking_*` a `dodging` jsou ostatní vstupy ignorovány. `blocking` opustíš puštěním `↓`. Weak cooldown blokuje jen další `→` — block / dodge / strong jsou v jeho průběhu volné.
85	
86	### Klávesy
87	
88	Šipky (dpad-style):
89	
90	- `→` (vpravo, tap) — fast weak attack (instant swing + 4t recovery)
91	- `↑` (nahoru) — strong attack
92	- `↓` (dolů, hold) — block
93	- `←` (vlevo, tap) — dodge
94	
95	`Space` (mimo gameplay) restartuje scénu po výhře.
96	
97	### Swing event hráče
98	
99	- **weak:** Po stisku `→` swing event okamžitě (0-tick windup), hráč přejde do 4-tickového `attacking_weak` recovery, pak ~8t v idle s aktivním cooldownem (celkem 12t od stisku). Fixní damage 15 HP. Reakční nástroj na enemy recovery / exhausted; cooldown drží svižnost tím, že brání spam-mashi.
100	
101	- **strong:** Swing event na **6. ticku** stavu `attacking_strong` (recovery 7.–16.). Fixní damage 25 HP.
102	
103	> Charging weak attack varianta (drž `→` pro nabíjení 1–15 HP) byla prototypovaná v commitu `317b1d2` a později reverted. Archiv designu + kódu: `features/charge.md`.
104	
105	V obou případech se efekt aplikuje na enemy na základě jeho aktuálního stavu (viz Enemy tabulky výše) a současně se spustí swing animace.
106	
107	### Riposte & Perfect parry
108	
109	- **Active parry → riposte.** Když hráč **active blockem** vykryje **weak** enemy swing (block v prvních `block_active_ticks` ticích), vedle drainu fatigue se hráči **aktivuje riposte** na okno `riposte_window_ticks` (14t). Dokud je riposte aktivní, **další útok hráče, který skutečně udělí damage**, je násoben `riposte_damage_multiplier` (×1.6) a riposte se spotřebuje. Whiff (útok na idle/threat enemy = žádný damage) riposte **nespotřebuje**.
110	- **Perfect parry → stagger.** Pokud active parry proběhl velmi brzy (`blocking_ticks_elapsed <= perfect_parry_ticks`, tj. block započal před ≤3 ticky v momentě, kdy se weak swing resolvne), jde o **perfect parry** — navíc **staguje enemy** (`staggered` na `stagger_ticks`, wide-open, všechny útoky zasáhnou, nemůže nic dělat). Perfect parry je striktní podmnožina active parry (`perfect_parry_ticks < block_active_ticks`).
111	- **Pasivní block** (držený déle než `block_active_ticks`) jen chrání — žádný drain, žádné riposte, žádný stagger (beze změny).
112	
113	Riposte gold tint na hráči indikuje aktivní okno (viz `plan.md` polish vrstva).
114	
115	## Swing resolve (na posledním ticku enemy `threat_*`)
116	
117	V pořadí:
118	
119	1. `player.state == dodging` → **miss**. Žádný efekt.
120	2. Slabý útok (`threat_weak`) a `player.state == blocking`:
121	   - **Active parry** (block započal v posledních `block_active_ticks` tickách): `enemy.fatigue −= 10` **+ hráči se aktivuje riposte** (`set_riposte_ready()`). Žádný hit.
122	     - **Perfect parry** (`blocking_ticks_elapsed <= perfect_parry_ticks`): navíc enemy → `staggered` (`stagger_ticks`).
123	   - **Pasivní block** (block drží déle než `block_active_ticks`): hráč chráněn, ale žádný drain, žádné riposte. Žádný hit.
124	3. Silný útok (`threat_strong`) a `player.state == blocking` → **blok neúčinný** (fall-through na 4).
125	4. Jinak → **hráč zasažen**:
126	   - `enemy.hp = min(100, enemy.hp + 10)`
127	   - `enemy.fatigue = min(40, enemy.fatigue + 30)`
128	   - `player.reset_combo()` (combo se přeruší při zásahu).
129	
130	Filozofie: zásah hráče **regeneruje** nepřítele — player je invincible, takže pasivita musí být penalizována.
131	
132	## Swing resolve (hráč zasahuje enemy)
133	
134	Když hráčův swing dopadne (na posledním ticku windupu), efekt závisí na enemy stavu:
135	
136	- `threat_*` → žádný efekt (telegraph nelze přerušit).
137	- `idle` → weak nic, strong drainuje fatigue (viz tabulka „Reakce v idle“). Žádný damage.
138	- `recovery_weak` / `recovery_strong` / `exhausted` / **`staggered`** → **hit window**, damage dopadne. Základ je `hp_damage_weak` (15) / `hp_damage_strong` (25), pak se aplikují multiplikátory:
139	  - **Riposte** (pokud `is_riposte_ready()`): `× riposte_damage_multiplier` (×1.6) a riposte se spotřebuje.
140	  - **Execute** (pokud `enemy.hp <= execute_threshold_hp`, tj. ≤25 HP): `× execute_damage_multiplier` (×1.5).
141	  - Multiplikátory se **násobí mezi sebou** (riposte × execute), zaokrouhlí se až nakonec: `int(round(base × ...))`.
142	  - Po udělení damage: `player.add_combo()` (combo +1).
143	
144	`staggered` se chová jako plnohodnotné hit window — všechny útoky zasáhnou.
145	
146	## Combo & Rank
147	
148	Feedback vrstva, **nemění pravidla** — jen vizuální odměna za agresivitu.
149	
150	- `combo` +1 při **každém útoku hráče, který udělí damage** enemymu.
151	- Reset na 0 když: hráče zasáhne enemy swing (`reset_combo()`), **nebo** uplyne `combo_timeout_ticks` (48t ≈ 3 s) bez nového damaging hitu.
152	- `max_combo` drží nejlepší combo za session.
153	- **Rank** z aktuálního comba:
154	
155	  | Combo | Rank |
156	  |---|---|
157	  | ≥ 15 | S |
158	  | ≥ 10 | A |
159	  | ≥ 5 | B |
160	  | ≥ 1 | C |
161	  | 0 | — (žádný) |
162	
163	HUD ukazuje aktuální combo + rank top-center (combo ≥ 1) a `max_combo` + rank na výherním overlayi.
164	
165	## Execute
166	
167	Když `enemy.hp <= execute_threshold_hp` (≤ 25 HP), enemy je v **execute** fázi: dostane ustálený načervenalý tint a hráčovy zásahy, které dopadnou, dělají bonus damage `× execute_damage_multiplier` (×1.5). Stackuje se multiplikativně s riposte. Účel: rychlejší finisher v závěru souboje.
168	
169	> **Polish (čistě prezentace, gameplay neovlivňuje):** hit-stop (freeze frames při zásazích — různé délky pro weak / strong / parry / stagger) a readability tinty (threat onset pulse žlutě, staggered cyan, execute červeně, riposte-ready gold) jsou pouze vizuální vrstva. Detaily a hodnoty viz `plan.md` polish vrstva + `sprites/SPRITES.md` modulate priority.
170	
171	## Win condition
172	
173	- `enemy.hp <= 0` → "VÝHRA" overlay. `Space` restartuje scénu.
174	- Lose condition v1 neexistuje.
175	
176	## Souhrn FSM diagramů
177	
178	### Enemy
179	```
180	                  ┌── 85 % ──► threat_weak (8t) ──┬─ real ──[swing]──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──┐
181	idle (12–48t) ───►│                               └─ feint ──► idle (feint_idle_ticks) ─► re-decide
182	                  └── 15 % ──► threat_strong (12t) ─[swing]──► recovery_strong (16t) ──┤
183	                                                                                     ▼
184	                                          ┌──────────────────────────────────────  idle (loop)
185	fatigue → 0 ───► exhausted (48t) ──► idle (fatigue=40)
186	perfect parry ───► staggered (stagger_ticks) ──► idle
187	```
188	
189	### Player
190	```
191	idle ──┬─ → tap ──► attacking_weak (0t windup + 4t recovery, swing instant) ──► idle
192	       ├─ ↑     ──► attacking_strong (16t, swing na 6. ticku) ──► idle
193	       ├─ ↓ ↓   ──► blocking ─(↓ ↑)─► idle   (active parry weak → arm riposte; perfect parry → enemy staggered)
194	       └─ ← tap ──► dodging (8t) ──► idle  (+ 24t cooldown na další dodge)
195	
196	riposte armed (riposte_window_ticks) ──► další damaging hit ×1.6, pak consume
197	```
198	
199	## Co tento gameplay v1 nepokrývá
200	
201	- Touch input pro mobil — v1 jen klávesnice.
202	- Více typů nepřátel — v1 jen jeden základní vzor (12–48 idle, 15 % strong).
203	- Player stats (HP, stamina) — v1 invincible.
204	- Postup / level progression — v1 jediný souboj, restart po výhře.
